name: input-otp-separator
visual_summary: The input-otp-separator is a UI component used to separate Input-One-Time-Pin (OTP) fields, providing a clear and organized layout for users to input verification codes. It is commonly used in login or registration forms where OTP verification is required. This component is ideal for scenarios where a clear separation between OTP fields is needed.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-otp-separator
Description: The input-otp-separator is a UI component used to separate Input-One-Time-Pin (OTP) fields, providing a clear and organized layout for users to input verification codes. It is commonly used in login or registration forms where OTP verification is required. This component is ideal for scenarios where a clear separation between OTP fields is needed.
Style: minimal, responsive
Interactions: hover-effect, focus-state
Tags: input, otp, verification, form, component, registry:example

Requirements:

- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
